examples.spanish: Nada, nada. Te había dicho en ese voice que yo estaba ñoñita, que estaba puesta pa' decirte que estaba loca por llenarte esa carita de besito', darte un abrazo, morderte. Pero que con esa pichaera tuya que lo que me dan gana' es de mandarte pa' buen sitio, y que no sabía que iba hacer con usted, señorito.
examples.english: Nothing, nothing. I had told you in that voice that I was nerdy, that I was ready to tell you that I was crazy for filling that little face with a kiss, giving you a hug, biting you. But with that pichaera of yours, what I want is to send you to a good place, and I didn't know what I was going to do with you, young man.
